About Me
Creativity meets strategy, every time.

Hi, I'm Favour Fagbola — a digital marketing specialist from Lagos, Nigeria with 3+ years of hands-on experience helping brands show up online in ways that feel authentic and deliver real results.

I've worked across real estate, beauty, tech, and AI — growing communities, running high-converting ad campaigns, setting up full email marketing automation workflows, managing TikTok shops, and building websites. Whether I'm crafting a campaign from scratch or deep in analytics, I bring the same intention: make it count.

I'm currently studying B.Sc. Microbiology at Olusegun Agagu University of Science and Technology — proof that analytical thinking is central to everything I do.

🎯 Strategy-First Approach

Every campaign starts with audience research, clear goals, and a brand-aligned voice — then building backward from the result you need.

📊 Data-Driven Decisions

A/B testing, audience segmentation, performance reporting — I track what matters and optimise relentlessly.

⚙️ Full-Funnel Execution

From awareness ads to email nurture sequences to community management — I handle the full digital journey.

Email Marketing & Automation
Workflows that nurture and convert

Built multi-step email automation sequences in Zoho Campaigns — complete with triggers, wait nodes, conditional branches, and response tracking.

Branched Automation Sequence

Conditional workflow triggering separate paths based on email opens, link clicks, and deliveries — maximising engagement at every stage.

Multi-Step Drip Sequence

Day-by-day nurture sequence with timed wait nodes and response tracking — designed to guide leads from awareness to action over a full week.

Client Feedback — Automation Approved ✓

WhatsApp exchange with KairosLabs manager confirming the automation was built, tested, and activated — direct client approval in action.
